_comment: Mutation testing for the pure lib/ modules — measures whether the unit/property tests actually kill injected bugs. Runs weekly (non-blocking), like fuzz. See docs/testing.md.
_mutate_comment: Logic-bearing modules. gestures.ts is included now that swipeNavigate is unit-tested in jsdom. Omitted: syllabus-icons.ts (a presentation data table — mutating emoji/colour literals reflects data, not a test weakness).
